researchResults.title: Learn to build warehouse robots people enjoy working with at the Robotics Summit
researchResults.description:
At the Robotics Summit & Expo, Anthony Jules, Robust.AI, will explore what it takes to bring automation into complex warehouse environments.

The post Learn to build warehouse robots people enjoy working with at the Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Tennibot launches Partner V2, its latest robotic tennis ball machine
researchResults.description:
Attendees at the Robotics Summit & Expo in Boston will get a chance to interact with Tennibot's technology firsthand.

The post Tennibot launches Partner V2, its latest robotic tennis ball machine appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day workweek
researchResults.description: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.

researchResults.title: Faraday Future’s Aegis quadruped passes compliance certification for U.S. sales
researchResults.description:
The tests ensure that Aegis robots are fully compliant with all applicable safety, security, and spectrum standards.

The post Faraday Future’s Aegis quadruped passes compliance certification for U.S. sales appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: AES Maximo robot installs 100 megawatts of solar capacity
researchResults.description:
Maximo, a robotics startup incubated by energy company AES, has successfully deployed its solar panel installation robots at a site in California.

The post AES Maximo robot installs 100 megawatts of solar capacity appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: AI startup Rocket offers vibe McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of the cost
researchResults.description: Rocket's new AI platform combines strategy, product building, and competitive intelligence, aiming to move beyond code generation.

researchResults.title: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
researchResults.description: Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund. It has already written some checks.

researchResults.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
researchResults.description: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

researchResults.title: Iran threatens ‘Stargate’ AI data centers
researchResults.description: Iran said it will target U.S.-linked data centers with new missile strikes, as the war between the U.S. and Iran escalates.

researchResults.title: NORD Drivesystems launches industrial gear units for the mining industry
researchResults.description:
NORD designed the MAXXDRIVE series with a one-piece UNICASE housing that ensures high structural rigidity and leak protection.

The post NORD Drivesystems launches industrial gear units for the mining industry appeared first on The Robot Report.
